_note: Router.route delegates to PathRouter.route which validates the path, checks for duplicate routes (merging MethodRouters via merge_for_path), then inserts into the matchit-based Node. Callers: Router.route itself (public API, uses tap_inner macro + panic_on_err), PathRouter.merge (re-routes during merge), PathRouter.nest (re-routes nested paths). Test coverage is extensive in routing/tests/mod.rs (87 .route calls), routing/tests/nest.rs (41 calls), and routing/tests/merge.rs (40 calls). Risks: panics on invalid paths (validate_path enforces leading slash and v07 checks), changing the signature affects all examples and every builder chain. The #[track_caller] annotation is used for better panic locations.
